notes: Review #29 critical bug (flat array workers.json) was fixed. Keyboard hash bug also fixed. Core persistent issues remain: no ErrorBoundary (5th flag), no React.memo (8th flag), App.jsx monolith (5th flag). New issues found this review: ProgressBar milestone flash bug, stats-bar grid overflow.

suggestions.title: App.jsx is a 997-line monolith — extract components NOW
suggestions.description: App.jsx contains WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog, ProgressBar, EmptyState, LoadingSkeleton, StatusBadge, DeltaBadge, and the main App all in one file. This is the 5th consecutive review flagging this. Extract each into its own file under src/components/. This blocks testability, maintainability, and code review quality.

suggestions.title: No ErrorBoundary — any render crash = blank white screen
suggestions.description: 5th consecutive flag. No ErrorBoundary anywhere. A single null dereference in CharacterAvatar or bad timestamp crashes the entire app with zero recovery. Add a top-level ErrorBoundary in main.jsx and a secondary one around Office.

suggestions.title: ProgressBar milestone flash fires on mount for pre-progressed workers
suggestions.description: When a worker loads at 60% progress, the milestone useEffect immediately triggers flash animations for 25% and 50% because milestonesRef starts empty. Pre-populate milestonesRef with already-passed milestones on init.

suggestions.title: StatsBar grid breaks with conditional Error/Stuck cards
suggestions.description: stats-bar uses grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr). When Error or Stuck cards render (6-7 cards total), overflow cards sit awkwardly on a second row. Use repeat(auto-fill, minmax(130px, 1fr)) instead.

suggestions.title: Tab switching pollutes browser history
suggestions.description: Every tab click pushes a new history entry via window.location.hash. After switching tabs 5 times, the back button cycles through internal tab states instead of leaving the page. Replace with history.replaceState().

suggestions.title: Mobile: ~40% dead space below office floor
suggestions.description: On 375px mobile, the office floor + header + tabs take ~430px, leaving ~300px of empty space. Add a compact vibe strip or mini stats below the floor on mobile, or change aspect-ratio to 1/1 for small screens.

suggestions.title: No React.memo on any component — full re-render every 30s
suggestions.description: 8th flag. WorkerCard, StatsBar, ActivityLog, ProgressBar all re-render from scratch on every poll cycle even when data is unchanged. Wrap in React.memo.

suggestions.title: StatsBar stuck-worker detection fails for null 'started' field
suggestions.description: Workers with started: null (like idle Dave) cause new Date(null).getTime() = 0, making Date.now() - 0 always > 7200000. Every idle worker with null started shows as 'stuck'. Add a null guard.

suggestions.title: getRelativeTime duplicated in App.jsx and Office.jsx
suggestions.description: Nearly identical implementations in both files. Extract to src/utils/time.js.

suggestions.title: WorkerCard uses generic role emoji while Office uses custom SVG — identity inconsistency
suggestions.description: Clicking a character in the office shows a rich SVG avatar. The dashboard shows a generic role emoji for the same person. Import CharacterAvatar into WorkerCard for consistency.

suggestions.title: Footer version hardcoded as 'v1.0.0-chaos'
suggestions.description: Import version from package.json instead of hardcoding. Vite supports JSON imports natively.

suggestions.title: Luna SVG gradient ID collision risk
suggestions.description: luna-hair-luna is always the gradient ID. If Luna renders in multiple contexts simultaneously, gradient references break. Use React useId() for unique IDs.
